reviews.comment:
Estuvo bien, como siempre en época de mucho turismo el baño de mujeres se tardo una eternidad.
Buenas promos para comprar en el ypf full.

(Translated by Google)
It was okay, but as always during peak tourist season, the women's restroom took forever to use. Good deals for buying gas at the YPF Full station.
